name: franchise-evaluator
description: Evaluate a franchise opportunity before signing. Extract key data from the FDD, analyze deal risks, compare against alternatives, assess overall risk, and produce a go/no-go checklist.

config.instruction: Extract key data from the franchise disclosure document or description: initial investment range, ongoing royalty %, marketing fee %, territory exclusivity, term length, renewal conditions, Item 19 earnings claims, franchisee count and turnover rate.
Analyze the deal risks: franchise failure rate, market saturation, territory overlap, litigation history, franchisor financial health, hidden fees, restrictive covenants, and exit difficulty.
Compare this franchise against 3-5 alternatives in the same category. Score on: initial investment, ROI timeline, brand strength, support quality, territory value, and franchisee satisfaction.
Produce an overall risk assessment combining deal-specific risks and competitive positioning. Rate as LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL with justification for each dimension.
Build a go/no-go decision checklist. Include: financial readiness, market validation, risk tolerance match, legal review items, questions to ask existing franchisees, and a final recommendation.
